case_title: COMMINS & WEBSTER, P.C. VS. JESSE GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,080.00 FILED BY COMMINS & WEBSTER, P.C. AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, JESSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMMINS & WEBSTER, P.C.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-04-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, JESSE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMINS & WEBSTER, P.C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ, JESSE $3,080.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,130.00, PLAINTIFF IS AUTHORIZED TO WITHDRAW $3080.00 HELD IN TRUST ACCOUNT - REQUEST FOR SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE GRANTED PER CCP 116.220. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
